summary: Stoked Tab Implementation Testing Complete - All features verified. Backend /api/stoked/{user_id} endpoint returns correct data for surfer users with credits, supporters, gear/session purchases, and stoke level info. Frontend StokedTab component renders correctly with Overview, Supporters, and Purchases sub-sections. Tab visibility correctly restricted to Surfer roles only (not shown for Photographers).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/stoked/{user_id} endpoint correctly checks user role eligibility (Grom, Comp Surfer, Pro, Surfer)
Backend returns is_eligible: false with message for non-surfer roles (Photographer, etc.)
Backend correctly calculates stoke_level progression with current/next level and progress percentage
Frontend StokedTab.js correctly fetches data from /api/stoked/{userId} endpoint
Frontend Profile.js line 486-487: isSurfer check correctly identifies surfer roles
Frontend Profile.js line 497: Stoked tab only added for isSurfer && !isPhotographer
Frontend StokedTab.js has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Frontend sub-section navigation (Overview, Supporters, Purchases) works correctly
Empty states properly displayed when no supporters/purchases exist
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stoked Tab implementation verified: (1) Backend /api/stoked/{user_id} returns credits received, supporters list, gear/session purchases, stoke level progression for surfer roles. (2) Frontend StokedTab.js component with Overview/Supporters/Purchases sub-sections. (3) Profile.js shows Stoked tab only for Surfer roles (Grom, Surfer, Comp Surfer, Pro), not for Photographers. (4) Empty states display correctly when no data exists.

features_verified.backend_stoked_endpoint_surfer: VERIFIED - Returns is_eligible: true with full stoked data for Surfer role
features_verified.backend_stoked_endpoint_photographer: VERIFIED - Returns is_eligible: false for Photographer role
features_verified.backend_purchases_structure: VERIFIED - gear_purchases and session_purchases with total_spent, count, list
features_verified.frontend_stoked_tab_visible_surfer: VERIFIED - Stoked tab visible in profile tabs for Surfer user
features_verified.frontend_stoked_tab_hidden_photographer: VERIFIED - Stoked tab NOT visible for Photographer user
features_verified.frontend_overview_section: VERIFIED - Shows stoke level, credits summary, credit uses
features_verified.frontend_supporters_section: VERIFIED - Shows supporters list or empty state
features_verified.frontend_purchases_section: VERIFIED - Shows gear/session purchases or empty state
features_verified.frontend_subsection_navigation: VERIFIED - Overview, Supporters, Purchases tabs work correctly
